phases.name: dialogue
phases.purpose: Hermes proposes the next safe task and reasons with OpenClaw guardrails.
phases.exit_criteria: Dialogue fixture coverage is green and remains dialogue-only.

phases.name: package
phases.purpose: OpenClaw converts the dialogue into a controlled execution request.
phases.exit_criteria: The handoff package is ready and execution has not started.

phases.name: approval
phases.purpose: The operator approves or rejects the controlled execution request.
phases.exit_criteria: A separate approval token path exists before any execution.

phases.name: controlled_execution
phases.purpose: A separate OpenClaw executor runs the approved task within its boundary.
phases.exit_criteria: Executor reports changed files, validation output, and rollback state.

phases.name: verification
phases.purpose: Verifier checks the executor result against the requested task and safety gates.
phases.exit_criteria: Validation passes or rollback is selected.

phases.name: feedback
phases.purpose: Hermes records the result and proposes the next safe task.
phases.exit_criteria: Next safe task is available for a new dialogue loop.

execution_request.task_title: Create a read-only release summary for the task dialoguer loop
allowed_after: operator_approved == true through a separate approval token path

blocked_actions: starting controlled execution from the handoff package
treating handoff package as operator approval
running worker execution without a separate executor
invoking a model from the handoff package
rollback_path: Discard this handoff package; it did not persist registry, SQLite, worker, model, approval, or execution state.
next_safe_task: Add a controlled executor intake validator that consumes this handoff package without starting execution.
